episodes.title: S2 E6   The Great Unlearning | Escaping a Cult-Like Church & Toxic Dating Cycles
episodes.description:
"Unlearning" is the hardest part of any midlife rebrand. Today, Jamie joins us for Part Two of her incredible story of breaking free from spiritual control, fear-based theology, and the trap of "wifely submission."

From being threatened with excommunication to navigating the modern dating world (and the "losers" we meet along the way), Jamie’s journey is a powerful look at what happens when you finally start trusting your own gut over someone else's dogma.

Inside the Episode:

00:00 – Essential Medical Disclaimer

03:45 – The "Submission" Trap: How the church responded to her divorce

15:20 – Spiritual Warfare vs. Reality: The "Released to Satan" threat

28:10 – Why we stay: Anxious/Avoidant attachment and childhood wounds

40:00 – The Midlife Rebrand: Astrology, fitness goals, and new beginnings

52:15 – What’s next: Previewing our upcoming guests

If you’re in the middle of your own "Great Unlearning," hit subscribe and join our community.

#TheGreatUnlearning #MidlifeRebrand #ReligiousTrauma #SpiritualAbuse #DatingAfterDivorce #Intuition
